title: Functools, Operator Functions, Caching, and Dispatch · Pipeline Brief: Operator Functions
summary: Build reusable scoring functions without obscuring cache validity or dispatch behavior. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp operator functions increment in a measured callable utility and dispatch package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use operator callables when they make key extraction and composition more inspectable.
Design singledispatch registrations around first-argument type contracts and safe fallbacks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
